violations.text: Inspector observed produce (zucchini) with mold in walk-in cooler. PIC disposed of zucchini. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer and rubber scraper) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed/sanitized items. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2026
Inspector observed various items displayed at self-service continental breakfast without protection from contamination by consumers. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2026
The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - prep units - freezer units - table under grill Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2026

The following food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils were observed with an accumulation of food and debris: - ice machine - slicer - knife - blender - scoop The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC placed in utensils in dish room AND took slicer and ice machine out of service to be washed/sanitized. PIC disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Various TCS items were observed held between 53-55 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed of items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Various items were observed not marked with the date of preparation or thaw date. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation and/or date of thawing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
Inspector observed cooked egg whites past the 7 day date marking. PIC disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Inspector observed the following in poor repair: - 1 door fridge (ambient of 53F) - top of prep unit (ambient of 50F) Units were taken out of service and service was called. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - prep tables - prep units - refrigeration/freezer units - table under grills New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
Inspector observed heavy ice accumulation (large icicle and ice on floor) in walk-in freezer. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The walls in the dishwasher and kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
ROP tuna was observed thawing with packaging intact, temperature of 39-40 degrees. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Trash and other debris was observed on the ground around the dumpster area. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025
A hole was observed in the floor in the chemical storage room. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The floor/wall junctures in the dry storage area has an accumulation of old rodent droppings debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
